parameters.query:
INSERT INTO customer_contacts 
  (channel, contact_name, content, summary, sentiment, has_todo, is_critical, received_at)
VALUES 
  (
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["channel"] }}',
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["contact_name"] }}',
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["content"] }}',
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["summary"] }}',
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["sentiment"] }}',
    {{ $node["Response Parser"].json["has_todo"] }},
    {{ $node["Response Parser"].json["is_critical"] }},
    '{{ $node["Response Parser"].json["received_at"] }}'
  )
